title: Frontend testing infrastructure (GH #116/#117/#118/#119)
description:
Epic: Frontend Approval/Snapshot Testing Infrastructure

## GH Issues
- Parent: https://github.com/civictechdc/votecatcher/issues/119
- Vitest browser mode: https://github.com/civictechdc/votecatcher/issues/116
- HTML scrubber: https://github.com/civictechdc/votecatcher/issues/117
- ARIA snapshot tests: https://github.com/civictechdc/votecatcher/issues/118

## Goal
Add approval/golden-master snapshot testing to frontend. Three strategies: ARIA snapshots (primary), HTML with scrubber (secondary), screenshot visual regression (deferred).

## Execution Order
1. Set up Vitest browser mode (#116) — enables everything else
2. Build HTML scrubber utility (#117) — needed for HTML snapshots
3. Implement ARIA snapshot tests for key components (#118)
